expectations.text: The output contains exactly 3 user stories and does not invent UI stories or browser verification.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Personal Access Token Backend",
  "branchName": "personal-access-token-backend",
  "description": "Add hashed personal access token persistence plus create and revoke server actions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add hashed token storage with null deactivation marker",
      "description": "As a developer, I want personal access tokens stored as hashes with a null deactivation marker for active records so server actions can manage tokens without persisting plaintext.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Token persistence stores only hashed token values and the deactivation timestamp defaults to null for active tokens.",
        "Storage layer can represent token label and audit metadata needed by server actions.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/personal-access-tokens.*",
        "src/auth/personal-access-token-model.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Create token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a create-token server action that validates label length and returns plaintext token once so callers can present it at creation time only.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create-token server action validates label length before writing a new personal access token record.",
        "Successful token creation returns the plaintext token exactly once while storing only its hash.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/auth/create-personal-access-token.*",
        "src/auth/personal-access-token-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Revoke token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a revoke-token server action that marks a token revoked without deleting it so auditability and token history remain intact.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke-token server action sets revokedAt for the targeted token without deleting the record.",
        "Revocation prevents future use of the token while preserving stored metadata.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/auth/revoke-personal-access-token.*",
        "src/auth/personal-access-token-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
